app.title: Voice Rooms
app.subtitle: Overview of your temporary voice channels.

setup.title: Setup incomplete
setup.lobbyMissing: No lobby channel configured. Set a Lobby Channel ID in Settings.
setup.categoryMissing: No category configured. Set a Category ID in Settings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure temporary voice channel behaviour.
settings.saveError: Failed to save settings. Please try again.

config.heading: Channel Configuration
config.enabledDesc: Master switch for temporary channel automation.
config.lobbyChannelIdDesc: Joining this voice channel triggers the creation of a temporary channel.
config.categoryIdDesc: Category in which temporary channels are created.
config.channelIconDesc: Emoji prepended to new channel names (e.g. 🔵).
config.channelNameDesc: Base name appended after the icon for generated channels.
config.countingStyleDesc: How multiple channels are numbered: numerically (Voice Room 1, 2, …) or with emoji sequences (🔵, 🟢, 🔴, …).
config.renameEnabledDesc: Allow users to change their channel icon via an interactive select menu.
config.activityTrackingDesc: Record activity duration per member for statistics.

admin.title: Access Rights
admin.subtitle: Control which roles can access the Settings page.
admin.saveError: Failed to save. Please try again.

roles.heading: Settings Page Access
roles.description: Select which roles are allowed to view and edit the Settings page. Admins always have access.
roles.adminNote: Admins always have access to the Settings page and cannot be removed.

renameMenu.notInVoice: You are not connected to a voice channel.
renameMenu.notManaged: Your current voice channel is not managed by this app.
renameMenu.noFreeIcons: No free icons are available right now.
renameMenu.prompt: Select a new icon for your channel ({token} {name}).
renameMenu.iconOccupied: This icon is already used by another managed voice channel.
renameMenu.channelNotManaged: Your current channel is not managed by this app.

error.load: Failed to load data. Please refresh the page.
error.settings: Failed to load settings. Please refresh the page.
